SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_CLUMP.title: Petricite Clump
SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_CLUMP.descriptio: During the next combat, the first [gold]Skill[/gold] you play each turn costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} more.
SLAYRUNETERRA-REJUVENATE.title: Rejuvenate
SLAYRUNETERRA-REJUVENATE.description: The first time you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], Heal to Max HP
SLAYRUNETERRA-ESSENCE_OF_AN_ANGEL.title: Essence of an Angel
SLAYRUNETERRA-JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
SLAYRUNETERRA-JUDGEMENT.description:
At the beginning of combat gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Relics[/gold] you have.{IsEvent: ([blue]{CalculatedVigor:diff()}[/blue])|{HasOwner:

Grants [blue]{CalculatedVigor:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].|}}
SLAYRUNETERRA-RING_OF_CARNAGE.title: Ring of Carnage
SLAYRUNETERRA-RING_OF_CARNAGE.descriptio: If you only played [red]attacks[/red] this turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of next turn.
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_IDOL.title: Divine Idol
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_IDOL.description: Upon pickup, add {InRun:[blue]1[/blue] [gold]{IsMultiplayer:Greater |}Divine Intervention[/gold]|an [gold]Intervention[/gold]} to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_FEATHER.title: Divine Feather
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_FEATHER.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Celestial Blessing[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SLAYRUNETERRA-SWORD_OF_JUDGEMENT.title: Sword of Judgement
SLAYRUNETERRA-SWORD_OF_JUDGEMENT.descrip: After you break an enemies [gold]Block[/gold], apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_HELMET.title: Divine Helmet
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_HELMET.description: You can not lose more than [blue]{DamageCap:diff()}[/blue] HP at once.
